source_name: Defence sovereign industry and resilience context
notes: Manual extract from public Defence sovereign industrial priority, GWEO and AUKUS industry pages. Industry rows describe official program context, not private company performance or classified supply-chain depth.
source_rights: Commonwealth copyright; Defence copyright terms apply
citation: Department of Defence, Sovereign Defence Industrial Priorities; Guided Weapons and Explosive Ordnance Enterprise; Australian Submarine Agency industry pages.

sdip_priorities: Aircraft maintenance, repair, overhaul and upgrade
Domestic manufacture of guided weapons, explosive ordnance and munitions
Test and evaluation, certification and systems assurance

program_rows.name: Guided Weapons and Explosive Ordnance Enterprise
program_rows.headline: Up to A$21b over the decade in GWEO enterprise funding is published by Defence.
program_rows.boundary: Program funding and industrial priority context only; no munition stockpile size or readiness metric is shown.

program_rows.name: AUKUS submarine industry strategy
program_rows.headline: ASA describes a plan to develop sovereign industrial capability to deliver, operate and sustain future conventionally armed nuclear-powered submarines.
program_rows.boundary: Qualitative official program context; no private supply-chain capacity estimate is inferred.

program_rows.name: Henderson, estate and GWEO alternative financing
program_rows.headline: The 2026 NDS budget factsheet identifies around A$5b over forward estimates and A$15b over the decade in projects for which Defence will prioritise alternative financing options.
program_rows.boundary: Alternative-financing project envelope only; not a capability availability metric.

fields.boundary: Industry rows explain official industrial capability priorities and program context. They do not publish sensitive supply-chain depth, stockpile adequacy, classified facilities or private company performance.
